GIS operation: Metric CRS spatial join to 1 km grid
Interpretive boundary: Activity morphology, not observed pet ownership.

GIS operation: Representative-point aggregation, checked by polygon-grid intersection
Derived indicators: count, footprint ratio, height, function shares
Interpretive boundary: Grid morphology, not parcel-level land-use causality.

GIS operation: Point-grid spatial join and category entropy
Derived indicators: POI density, service counts, functional mix

GIS operation: Centroid sampling, checked by raster-window zonal statistics
Interpretive boundary: Urban intensity anchor, not service quality.

GIS operation: Exact footprint and zonal-statistics sensitivity tests
Derived indicators: footprint corr. 0.999; NTL corr. 0.976; morphology corr. 0.999
Interpretive boundary: Fast and exact morphology composites are nearly identical; model fit is stable.
